subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand firm in the Covenant! The blessed letter of the friends was read with the utmost tenderness at the threshold of His holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان نامه مبارک یاران با نهایت رقت تلاوت گردید و بدرگاه حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
